programme.title: Strictly Dance Crazes of the 80s!

programme.title: NCT JNJM 'BOTH SIDES' MV
programme.desc: ‘BOTH SIDES' is an energetic hip-hop dance track that blends refined sound design, smooth drum beats, and witty vocals with sharp rap. Its lyrics playfully capture the idea of captivating someone with two contrasting charms, drawing them into a delightful dilemma between equally irresistible choices.

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Siren effects and powerful vocals heighten the dramatic tension, while the lyrics liken a precious loved one to a crown coveted by many, conveying a desperate resolve to protect them at all costs.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Grizzly! This artist made his debut in the music industry in 2014 with his first single “D.S.” Since then he has been bringing soulful hits to our lives with his lifting vocals good vibes and aesthetically pleasing music combining R&B soul and pop. Thanks to his talents and passion he has collaborated with many big names in the industry including Dbo Khundi Panda Jaedal Punch nello SOLE and Coogie. On January 5 Grizzly made his way back to the charts with a love song called “Beige coat.” With lyrics about what a guy should do and prepare when he is on his way to meet someone he loves this new song is bound to immerse listeners deep into their feelings. In this episode Grizzly performs his new song “Beige coat” along with “Countryside” “Island” and more. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet his talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is Kang Baek-soo also known as the “fairy of literature and music”! Kang Baek-soo made his debut as a musician in 2010 with the EP “Songs Cross the River.” Since then he has touched the hearts of countless listeners with his heartfelt and witty music including “Time Machine” “Because of Ha Heon-jae” “Ulsan” and more. Prior to his debut as a musician he won the Rookie Award at the quarterly journal “Poetry and the World” in 2008 and pursued his career as a writer as well proving that he is the “real” fairy of literature and music. In this episode Kang Baek-soo performs “Time Machine” “I Want To Go Home” “Garcia” “Ulsan” and more to show off his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet Kang Baek-soo!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Composed of vocalist Joo Sung-geun and guitarist Oh Ji-hyun this band made their debut in April 2017 with the EP “DEAR : X.” Then they performed all the songs in their debut EP in Seoul Forest in the form of busking to engrave their name in the minds of the public. Thanks to their hard work and stunning musicality they won the Gold Prize at the 2017 Shinhan Card Rookie with the lead single off the debut EP “Draw the Line.” In December last year the duo released their third EP “naps!” to comfort our souls. Also the two have been participating in various soundtracks from TV series to variety shows to adverts actively expanding their reach in the entertainment industry. In this episode 1415 performs “Draw the Line” “I Am Blue” “SURFER” “naps!” and more to show off their artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these two talented musicians!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: For many eSNa might not be the first musician that comes to mind when thinking of Korean pop music. However she's actually a big name in the music scene with numerous hit songs under her belt. The list includes “Some” by SoYou and Junggigo “Without You” by Mad Clown “Piano Man” and “AHH OOP” by MAMAMOO and more. In 2014 she made her debut as a singer as well with the song “I I Love You“ and has participated in various soundtracks for TV series since then including ”The Heirs“ and ”Hogu's Love.“ In January this year this talented artist kicked off a remake project called “Nostalgia Project” which is an English version of Korean pop masterpieces that were released before K-pop became an international sensation. Backed up with her outstanding musicality and creative ideas which gave her success as a composer and lyricist eSNa is making her mark as a singer as well. In this episode eSNa performs “Some” “A Little Lovin” “Love Forgotten By Love” from “Nostalgia Project” and more. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: Please dont Date Him
programme.desc: Home appliance developer Seo Jisung dreams of an easy life like a welldesigned algorithm. The “smart voice recognition AI refrigerator” she is in the process of developing accidentally gets combined with an antiterrorism super sensor chip that went missing from the National Intelligence Service Korea. Her refrigerator that couldn't even determine whether an ingredient was rotten suddenly identifies human lowlifes without even needing her to tell it to. This leads to revealing the truth about Jisung's fiancé. The man she thought of as an elite was actually a criminal. At the perfect timing, Jung Gukhee, a firefighter that seems too good to be true shows up in her life.

programme.title: W-Two Worlds Apart
programme.desc: A Love Story Between A Couple In Their Early Thirties. They Belong To The Same Era But Alternate Realities. A Surgical Resident Is Pulled Into The Webtoon World Of W, Which Was Created By Her Father, And Becomes Entangled In A Murder Mystery

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: I Learned How To Cook Like A Professional Chef
programme.desc: Michelle trains at a professional culinary school to master knife skills, classic cooking techniques, and plating, then faces the pressure of preparing a full four-course meal for a panel of food critics.

programme.title: I Tried Ghost Hunting
programme.desc: Michelle joins seasoned paranormal investigators for her first-ever ghost hunt at the historic Warner Grand Theater.

programme.title: I Ran A Marathon In The Hottest Place On Earth
programme.desc: Michelle attempts to run a marathon in the hottest place on Earth, Death Valley.

programme.title: I Climbed An 85ft Cliff With Only 1 Week of Training
programme.desc: Michelle trains for one week with professional rock climbers to attempt her first-ever ascent up an 85-foot cliff face.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Chess Grandmaster
programme.desc: Michelle studies chess for 8 months to see if she can win her first-ever chess tournament.

programme.title: I Tried A Nuclear War Simulation
programme.desc: Michelle plays the role of Madam President in a high-stakes nuclear war simulation—where she has just 8 minutes to decide the fate of the world.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Broadway Star For 6 Weeks
programme.desc: Michelle commits to an intense six week journey to train as a triple threat performer mastering singing, dancing, and acting under the guidance of professional Broadway coaches, all while preparing to bring an original musical to life on stage.

programme.title: I Tried 911 Dispatch
programme.desc: Michelle trains with an emergency call center to experience the mental and emotional demands of being a 911 dispatcher.

programme.title: I Tried Marine Bootcamp
programme.desc: Michelle endures 3 days of bootcamp with the the U.S. Marine Corps.

programme.title: I Trained Like a NASA Astronaut
programme.desc: Michelle spends a week at NASA, training to flying fighter jets and learning how to preform high-pressure task in simulated zero gravity.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Professional Gamer
programme.desc: Michelle spends a week training at the San Diego Lifeguard Academy facing grueling water rescues and training drills necessary to learn how to save lives.

programme.title: I Tried Formula 1
programme.desc: Michelle gets rare access to the Red Bull Athlete Performance Center where she gets to experience the same training F1 drivers are put through.

programme.title: I Trained Like An Olympic Boxer
programme.desc: Under the guidance of an Olympic medalist boxing coach, Michelle trains for 18 months to box in front of 15,000 people for her fist sanctioned fight.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.sub-title: Try Guys Throw Zach's Dream Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Zombie hunting, alien sightings, drag queens, sound baths, magicians, speakeasies, and underground supper clubs!! What else would you expect in a weird and wild weekend honoring our boy Zach? This isn't just any ole' bachelor party… it's a Zachelor party!!

programme.title: Try Guys Try Forest Preschool
programme.desc: Into the woods with our new tiny friends!

programme.title: We Suck at Giving Presents
programme.desc: Who's the best at giving gifts? Keith, or Zach? They each gave each other four gifts to battle it out and see who is the ultimate gift giver.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: Abracadabra, magic! POOF! Today The Try Guys are trying magic. Can they put on a successful show in front of a tough audience? We'll see!

programme.title: Try Guys Get Lasered
programme.desc: Zap! Zap! Zach, Keith, and Kwesi get laser hair removal on their nether regions, and it's nothing short of a hilarious, zaptastic experience.

programme.title: Try Guys Fly a Plane Without Training
programme.desc: They aren't really going to let us fly a plane are they? OMG! Join Zach, Keith, and Sequoia at Sling Pilot Academy to take to the skies, without training!

programme.title: Try Guys Get Their Muscles Destroyed
programme.desc: Dr. Trumpi is back with The Try Guys, but this time she's not cracking bones, she's here to extreme deep tissue massage them. What's even better? She brought Vice Grip, her deep tissue massage specialist to get help the job done!

programme.title: Try Guys Give Tattoos Without Training
programme.desc: What's all the buzz? Oh yeah, The Try Guys are giving tattoos to clients without any training! Watch them create works of art...or maybe just work that needs to be fixed.

programme.title: Try Guys Get Barbie Makeovers
programme.desc: Hey Barbie! Hey Ken! Zach, Eugene, Joyce, and Jonny get Barbie Makeovers and remake the Barbie movie trailer. Who pulls off the best Barbie look? Watch and find out!

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.sub-title: Try Guys Try Period Cramps Simulation
programme.desc: Zach, Kwesi, and Jared spend an entire workday with period cramp simulators attached to their bodies to see if they can better understand what people who have periods experience while on their periods.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.sub-title: Try Guys Go To Shakespeare Academy
programme.desc: The guys are on a mission to master beetles and bards for their Romeo + Juliet LIVE show.

programme.title: Try Guys Try Swordfighting
programme.desc: It's the third and final part of our Romeo & Juliet series before the LIVE Choose Your Own Shakespeare finale! Keith, Zach, and Eugene visit Swordplay LA to learn the art of stage combat.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.sub-title: Try Guys Wear Makeup for a Week
programme.desc: Zach, Jonny, and Jimmy are taking on the challenge of incorporating makeup into their daily routine for an entire week. Will this give them an appreciation for makeup? Will they learn how much effort goes into a makeup routine? Check out this video till the end and find out!

programme.title: Try Guys Go To Mermaid School
programme.desc: What creatures live deep within the ocean?! We don't know, but we do know that today Kwesi and Zach are trying to be mermaids by attending mermaid school!

programme.title: Try Guys Wear Dresses For A week
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to wear dresses for an entire week? It may be common for some people, but for Jonny, Zach, and Jared it's a whole new world!

programme.title: Try Guys Blow Glass
programme.desc: Watch as Keith, Zach and Kwesi blow super hard on hot glass, heat up their long poles, and jam them into fiery glory holes (stop giggling!) as they learn first-hand about the incredible craft of glassblowing! (we said stop laughing! just watch!)

programme.title: Try Guys Test a Drunk Obstacle Course
programme.desc: The Try Guys Drunk Vs High is back and better than ever! Eugene, Zach, and Keith all try their hand at going through an obstacle course sober and drunk to see how they compare. Come back next Wednesday to see the guys try the course high!

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.5
programme.desc: Kang Chi and Yeo Wool are attacked by dark shadows. Kang Chi, unfamiliar with such opponents, is cut multiple times while fighting back. Hearing Kang Chi is injured, Chung Jo visits him out of worry, and they share an affectionate hug. Yeo Wool witnesses their embrace.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.8
programme.desc: Jo Gwan Woong, having framed Kang Chi for murder, orders his execution. At that moment, Yi Sun Shin appears, demands Kang Chi's release, and declares the punishment unjust.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.9
programme.desc: Dam Pyung Joon accepts Kang Chi and Tae Seo into the Mu Hyung Do Gwan (martial arts school), and Kang Chi strives to become a formal disciple. Jo Gwan Woong, suspicious of the Hundred Year Inn's asset list, searches for a secret vault. Meanwhile, Yi Sun Shin and Dam Pyung Joon plot to retrieve 5,000 nyang of silver without Gwan Woong's knowledge.

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: The peter's Birthday
programme.desc: Powerkids Kartoon Channel

programme.title: Pizza! Ppizza! Pizza!
programme.desc: When Sal Barzini, friend of Shaq and the owner of Tatagglia's Pizza, can't fill Shaq's big order because all his delivery people's cars are in the shop, Gronk, Himari, and Klaus are sent to help. Himari reluctantly agrees to help, but through a night of mishaps, it falls entirely on her handlebars to make all of the deliveries

programme.title: Fashion Genes
programme.desc: In order to have the best girl modeling her designs, Nicky decides to clone herself.

programme.title: Paintball Showdown
programme.desc: Jane is outside in the park making a painting when Jerry shootsfrom the paint gun andsplashes paint on her painting. Jane is furious and runs inside to confront Jerry

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: The Grand Mountain Adventure Chall_hine- pART 2
programme.desc: The Grand Mountain Adventure Chall_hine begins with Zoe and three other teams

programme.title: The Danger On The Mountain
programme.desc: Zoe, Harvey and lassie take a dangerous trip into the forest to find Zoe's beloved Aunt Kim

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Picnic

She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: Baby Sitting
programme.desc: In a whirlwind of imagination, Jerry's longing for an amusement park leads him on a playful adventure in his own home. From bouncing on the sofa to swinging from curtains and riding a makeshift fan merry-go-round, Jerry and Jane find joy and laughter in their imaginative escapades. Ultimately, they learn to embrace the magic of their own imagination, creating their very own amusement park wit_hin the walls of their home

programme.title: Lazy
programme.desc: JaneandJerryarepackingandkeepingfruits,bottle,hat,toys,clothesinsideapicnicbasket.Thentheygooutsidethehouse

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Boonie Cubs Season 2 is a bran-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. It follows young Vick, who finds a magical portal in a tree and finds a wonderful world where he attends Pine Tree Kindergarten with young Briar, young Bramble, and other kids where he learns in fun and exciting ways.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! Come journey with us to a charming little town called Fortune Valley, where the twelve animal-totems now associated with the Chinese lunar calendar spend their days frolicking merrily, often joining together to pursue a host of colorful projects and plans.

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac

programme.title: GATTU
programme.desc: In a Fairy Kingdom,there is a group of righteous Five-Spirit Guards who is protecting the locals from evils. They got magic power, for which is GG Bond always dreaming. But driven by the ambition and the lust for the power, some of Five-Spirit Guards attempted to break the peace of the world and forcibly occupy it.

programme.title: Simba The Lion King
programme.desc: The Lion King is shot by poachers, as part of Shere Khan the Bengal tiger's plot to overthrow the king from his throne. Young Simba, son of the Lion King, suspects something strange and subconsciously senses that the Tiger will one day be his greatest enemy. Simba and his two sisters are adopted into a wolf pack.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: They're beautiful - and deadly, with venomous spines that resemble a lion's mane. They're lionfish, a tropical reef species normally found in the Indo-Pacific. Now, they're wreaking havoc in the Caribbean and Atlantic – all thought to have descended from a handful of aquarium fish carelessly released into the sea. In these regions, they are potentially a greater threat to coral reefs and commercial fish populations than global warming or pollution.

programme.title: Eaten Alive by Sea Lamprey!
programme.desc: The sea lamprey is a nightmare with a mouth full of teeth. Coyote experiences what it's like to be eaten alive—literally.Coyote explores a recently abandoned grizzly bear cave, uncovering signs of the massive predator's presence in a thrilling and suspenseful wilderness episode.

programme.title: Area 51 Plane Crash – We Found It!
programme.desc: Mark explores a remote crash site in the desert rumored to be tied to Area 51. What he finds is strange, twisted, and possibly historic.Man O' War jellyfish are not true jellyfish—but they're still deadly. Mark gets stung and showcases their long, venomous tentacles.

programme.title: We Found Rare T‑Rex Teeth!
programme.desc: Coyote uncovers T-Rex teeth during a fossil hunt. Rare, real, and awe-inspiring, this one's for the dino lovers.

programme.title: Will It Bite?! – Giant Bloodsucking Parasite!
programme.desc: A giant bloodsucking parasite—will it bite? Coyote takes the risk to learn how these creatures latch onto hosts and extract blood.

programme.title: My Precious! – Coyote Goes Full Gollum!
programme.desc: Channeling his inner Gollum, Coyote becomes obsessed with a strange find in the wild. This lighthearted episode brings out his wildest side.

programme.title: Poison Ivy Smoothie – Big Mistake!
programme.desc: Coyote blends poison ivy into a smoothie to test a myth. Spoiler: bad idea. This wild episode mixes humor with a powerful message about plant toxicity.Roaches take over—literally. Coyote faces a nightmare infestation right on his head, exploring how these pests behave and thrive in close quarters.

programme.title: Stung by a Venomous Neon Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The neon caterpillar's venom isn't just a defense—it's a chemical marvel. Coyote experiences its sting firsthand.Who's faster—Coyote or the world's fastest animal? He sets up a high-stakes race to test reflexes, speed, and a bit of humility.

programme.title: Inked by a Tattoo Needle!
programme.desc: Coyote faces manys fear... Getting a tatoo!Caring for a miniature pony is no small job! Coyote visits a farm and learns the basics of grooming, feeding, and why these tiny horses need special care.

programme.title: Snapping Turtle vs. Hand: Will It Break?!
programme.desc: Snapping turtles are no joke, but can they actually break bone? Coyote puts his own hand (and nerves) on the line to find out.The stinging nettle may look harmless, but it hides a nasty surprise. Coyote experiences the sting and explains its effects and remedies.

programme.title: Insane Urban Beehive Extraction – You Won't Believe This!
programme.desc: Urban beekeeping gets extreme as Coyote removes a huge hive from a populated area. Flying stings and swarming bees make it a wild ride.What does a snake bite look like in slow motion? Coyote captures the full strike in ultra-HD to showcase precision and danger.

programme.title: Lake Erie Monster – Is It Real?!
programme.desc: Is the Lake Erie Monster real? Coyote dives into folklore, interviews, and lake searches to investigate the mystery behind the legend.Chiggers are tiny but brutal. Coyote takes one for the team to show what their bites look like and how to avoid the fiery aftermath.

programme.title: What Did I Find?! – Dissecting Snowy Owl Pellets!
programme.desc: Coyote dissects snowy owl pellets to uncover the tiny skeletons inside. This educational episode reveals what owls eat and how they digest it.Coyote challenges a tortoise to an all-you-can-eat green bean buffet. Hilarity ensues as the slow-and-steady eater powers through a feast.

programme.title: Eaten Alive – Human Hands vs. Piranha!
programme.desc: How does it feel to be bitten by piranhas? Coyote tests this freshwater legend with his own hands—and the results are intense.Slow motion never looked this painful. Coyote's hand meets a snapping turtle's jaw in a frame-by-frame breakdown of force and reaction.

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Attack Dogs!
programme.desc: In a dramatic training exercise, Coyote allows himself to be bitten by three trained attack dogs. Protective gear is tested to the limit.Ever wanted to catch fireflies and make a glow lantern? Coyote shows how to safely observe these luminous bugs and builds a bug-powered lantern.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI TAKES THE STATES 2022 hits the road for another epic adventure
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology - Colour change with the power of thought - The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range_en
programme.sub-title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation_en
programme.sub-title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation
programme.desc: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.sub-title: Digital Future Lighting - TechDay Digital Light - Digital Future Lighting
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.
